introSection: Figure 8 was a wooden side friction roller coaster located at Rocky Springs Park in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, USA. It opened in 1906. The coaster was demolished in 1917 and replaced with the Jack Rabbit.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Webpage containing a photograph of the coaster

fullText:
Figure 8 was a wooden side friction roller coaster located at Rocky Springs Park in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, USA. It opened in 1906. The coaster was demolished in 1917 and replaced with the Jack Rabbit.


 * Webpage containing a photograph of the coaster
